prerequisites: An active Clockodo account with API access enabled for the co-worker whose credentials you will use. The API key respects that co-worker's individual access rights.
The email address registered to that Clockodo account (supplied as the email_address config field).
The personal API key for that account, found under the 'Personal data' menu item in the Clockodo dashboard (supplied as the api_key secret field).
An external application identifier string for the X-Clockodo-External-Application header, in the format 'ApplicationName;contact@email' (supplied as the external_application config field).
A start_date marking the earliest point to begin replicating data, and a years value defining how many years of data to sync.

authMethods.name: API key (email + API key headers)
authMethods.summary: Clockodo authenticates each request with the account email address and a per-co-worker API key. The connector sends these as the X-ClockodoApiUser (email) and X-ClockodoApiKey (api_key) HTTP headers (equivalently usable as HTTP Basic auth user/password). Every request must also carry the X-Clockodo-External-Application header identifying the client, supplied here via the external_application field. Provide the api_key secret and email_address to enable this method.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your Clockodo API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Clockodo account and open the 'Personal data' menu item in the dashboard. Copy the personal API key shown there. The key is unique per co-worker and inherits that user's access rights.

setupSteps.title: Provide email and API key
setupSteps.body: Enter the email address registered to the Clockodo account in the email_address field and paste the API key into the api_key field. Clockodo uses these as the X-ClockodoApiUser and X-ClockodoApiKey request headers.

setupSteps.title: Set the external application identifier
setupSteps.body: Provide the external_application value, which Clockodo requires on every request via the X-Clockodo-External-Application header. Use the format 'ApplicationName;contact@email' (for example 'Polymetrics;you@example.com') so Clockodo can identify the calling client and a technical contact.

setupSteps.title: Configure the replication window
setupSteps.body: Set start_date to the earliest date from which to pull records and set years to the number of years of data to replicate forward from that date.
